tasks.title: Research: Expand beyond AI-first to comprehensive general automation platform
tasks.description:
Research and analysis required for implementing: "Expand beyond AI-first to comprehensive general automation platform"

**Implementation Task Details:**
Transform Sim from AI-first platform to comprehensive general automation platform to compete directly with n8n, Zapier, and Make, including:

**GENERAL AUTOMATION EXPANSION:**
1. **Traditional API Integrations**: REST/GraphQL API blocks, webhook processors, HTTP request builders, API authentication managers
2. **Database Connectors**: Advanced SQL query builders, NoSQL database integrations, data transformation pipelines, batch processing tools
3. **File Processing Workflows**: CSV/Excel processors, PDF generators, document converters, file system operations, bulk file handlers
4. **Communication Tools**: Advanced email automation, SMS/messaging integrations, notification systems, multi-channel broadcasting
5. **Web Scraping and Data Collection**: Advanced scraping tools, data extraction pipelines, monitoring and alerting, scheduled data collection
6. **Business Process Automation**: Invoice processing, approval workflows, document routing, compliance automation

**NEW BLOCK CATEGORIES:**
1. **Data Transformation Blocks**: JSON/XML processors, data mappers, formatters, validators, converters
2. **Control Flow Blocks**: Advanced loops, conditional branching, error handling, retry logic, parallel execution
3. **Scheduling and Timing**: Cron-like schedulers, time-based triggers, recurring workflows, calendar integrations
4. **Monitoring and Analytics**: Workflow performance tracking, error monitoring, usage analytics, business intelligence
5. **Security and Compliance**: Data encryption, access controls, audit logging, compliance reporting

**TECHNICAL IMPLEMENTATION:**
1. **Block Architecture**: Expand block registry with new categories, implement standardized block interfaces
2. **Execution Engine**: Enhance executor to handle traditional automation patterns, improve performance for high-volume workflows
3. **API Gateway**: Build unified API layer for external integrations, implement rate limiting and authentication
4. **Data Pipeline**: Create ETL pipeline framework, implement data streaming capabilities
5. **Monitoring System**: Build comprehensive workflow monitoring, implement alerting and notification systems

**SUCCESS CRITERIA:**
- 100+ new blocks covering traditional automation use cases
- Performance comparable to n8n for high-volume workflows
- Enterprise-grade security and compliance features
- Comprehensive API integration capabilities
- Advanced data transformation and ETL tools
- Business process automation templates
- Migration tools from competitors (n8n, Zapier, Make)

**Research Objectives:**
1. Investigate best practices and methodologies for this implementation
2. Identify potential challenges, risks, and mitigation strategies  
3. Research relevant technologies, frameworks, and tools
4. Define implementation approach and architecture decisions
5. Provide actionable recommendations and guidance

**Implementation Task ID:** task_1756933981823_qpk4h33l7

**Auto-created by:** TaskManager research dependency system
**Research Priority:** This research task must be completed before implementation begins
success_criteria: Implementation guidance and best practices identified
Risk assessment and mitigation strategies outlined

tasks.title: Build community integration marketplace with template sharing and rating system
tasks.description:
Implement a comprehensive community marketplace to compete with n8n community features, including:

**COMMUNITY MARKETPLACE FEATURES:**
1. **Template Sharing Platform**: User-generated workflow templates, community contributions, template publishing workflow
2. **Rating and Review System**: 5-star ratings, written reviews, usage statistics, quality indicators
3. **Integration Discovery**: Community-contributed connectors, custom blocks marketplace, plugin architecture
4. **User-Generated Content**: Template galleries, workflow showcases, best practice documentation
5. **Community Features**: User profiles, contribution tracking, reputation system, badges and achievements
6. **Moderation System**: Quality control, approval workflows, community guidelines, spam prevention

**TECHNICAL IMPLEMENTATION:**
1. **Database Extensions**: Community users, template submissions, ratings, reviews, moderation queues
2. **API Endpoints**: Template CRUD operations, rating/review APIs, user profile management, search and discovery
3. **UI Components**: Marketplace browser, template cards, rating displays, user profiles, submission forms
4. **Quality Control**: Automated template validation, manual review process, quality scoring algorithms
5. **Social Features**: Following users, template collections, sharing workflows, activity feeds
6. **Security**: Template sandboxing, malicious code detection, user permission management

**SUCCESS CRITERIA:**
- Community template submission and approval workflow
- Template rating and review functionality
- Advanced search and filtering for community content
- User reputation and contribution tracking system
- Integration with existing workflow editor
- Moderation tools and quality control measures
- Social features for community engagement

tasks.title: Create comprehensive template library system with business automation categories
tasks.description:
Implement a comprehensive template library system to compete with n8n, including categorized templates for:

**TEMPLATE CATEGORIES:**
1. **Business Automation**: CRM workflows, marketing campaigns, sales pipelines, lead management
2. **Data Processing & ETL**: Data transformation pipelines, database synchronization, API data collection
3. **DevOps & CI/CD**: Deployment automation, testing workflows, monitoring and alerting
4. **Social Media Management**: Content publishing, engagement tracking, cross-platform posting
5. **E-commerce Automation**: Order processing, inventory management, customer service workflows
6. **Financial & Accounting**: Invoice processing, payment automation, financial reporting

**TECHNICAL IMPLEMENTATION:**
1. **Database Schema**: Extend schema with template categories, tags, usage tracking, ratings
2. **Template Storage**: JSONB workflow templates with metadata, version control, usage analytics
3. **Discovery System**: Search, filtering, recommendations based on user behavior and industry
4. **Template Management**: Creation, editing, publishing, versioning, and quality control
5. **Integration Points**: Seamless template instantiation in workflow editor

**SUCCESS CRITERIA:**
- 50+ high-quality templates across all categories
- Template discovery and search functionality
- One-click template instantiation
- Template usage analytics and optimization
- Community rating and review system
- Template versioning and updates

tasks.title: Implement advanced non-AI automation capabilities to match n8n flexibility
tasks.description:
Implement comprehensive automation engine with:
1. Complex conditional branching system with IF/ELSE/SWITCH logic
2. Advanced scheduling system with cron-based scheduling and visual cron builder
3. Workflow control features with pause/resume, manual approval gates, retry mechanisms
4. Event trigger system with HTTP webhooks, file system watchers, database change triggers

Extend existing Sim workflow engine architecture in apps/sim/executor/ and apps/sim/blocks/ with new block types and enhanced execution engine.

tasks.title: Implement Nexus Copilot - Comprehensive API Integration
tasks.description:
Build a powerful Nexus copilot system that integrates with ALL API features in the Sim codebase. This will create a self-powered AI assistant using Claude API that can interact with workflows, users, billing, knowledge bases, templates, and all other system components.

COMPREHENSIVE INTEGRATION SCOPE:

1. NEXUS TOOLSET CREATION:
- Create apps/sim/lib/nexus/tools/ directory
- Implement comprehensive tools for ALL major API endpoints:
  * Workflow management (create, read, update, delete, execute)
  * User management and authentication
  * Billing and subscription management
  * Knowledge base operations
  * Template management and deployment
  * File operations (upload, download, organize)
  * OAuth credential management
  * Organization and team management
  * Environment variable management
  * Usage tracking and analytics
  * Webhook management
  * Custom tool integration

2. NEXUS BACKEND API:
- Create apps/sim/app/api/nexus/chat/route.ts
- Implement streaming Claude 3.5 Sonnet integration
- Connect all Nexus tools with proper error handling
- Add comprehensive logging and monitoring

3. NEXUS FRONTEND INTEGRATION:
- Duplicate and enhance copilot UI components
- Create dedicated Nexus panel in workflow editor
- Implement rich UI for tool responses
- Add visual feedback for complex operations

4. TOOL IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENTS:
- Each tool must have comprehensive error handling
- All tools should include detailed logging
- Implement proper authentication and authorization
- Add input validation and sanitization
- Include comprehensive JSDoc documentation

5. ADVANCED FEATURES:
- Multi-step workflow automation
- Contextual awareness of current workspace/workflow
- Intelligent suggestions based on user activity
- Integration with existing Sim copilot for coordination

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- Nexus can perform ALL major operations available via Sim APIs
- Complete integration with authentication and authorization
- Comprehensive error handling and user feedback
- Production-ready code with full logging and monitoring
- Seamless UI integration with existing workflow editor
success_criteria: Nexus copilot successfully integrated into workflow editor
All major API endpoints accessible via Nexus tools
Comprehensive error handling and logging implemented

tasks.title: Research and analyze Sim ecosystem expansion to compete with n8n
tasks.description: Comprehensive research and analysis of Sim codebase structure to implement ecosystem expansion features including template library system, community marketplace, and expansion beyond AI-first to general automation. This includes analyzing current blocks/tools architecture, database schema, UI patterns, and creating detailed implementation plans.

tasks.title: Research secure code execution patterns and implementation strategies for sandboxed JavaScript and Python environments
tasks.description: Research existing security patterns, sandboxing techniques, resource management, and permission controls for code execution environments. Focus on Node.js VM contexts, Python subprocess isolation, and container-based execution.

tasks.title: Research mobile development patterns and create comprehensive mobile interfaces for Sim workflow management
tasks.description: Research current mobile development patterns, PWA capabilities, React Native/Flutter options, and create mobile-optimized interfaces for workflow management including responsive design, native apps, and PWA features

tasks.title: Complete comprehensive API test migration analysis and strategy
tasks.description: Analyze all 118+ API test files for migration to bun/vitest infrastructure. Document successful patterns, prioritize files, and create detailed migration strategy to achieve 90%+ test pass rate.

tasks.title: Complete test infrastructure migration for remaining API test files
tasks.description:
Complete the migration of remaining 118+ API test files to use the new bun/vitest compatible test infrastructure. The migration patterns have been proven successful (improving test pass rates from 15% to 89%) and need to be applied across all API test files.

AFFECTED FILES:
- All files in apps/sim/app/api/**/*.test.ts
- Approximately 60+ API route test files
- Focus on high-priority workflow, authentication, and core API tests

MIGRATION APPROACH:
1. Apply working patterns from successful migrations (versions, collaboration)
2. Replace vi.doMock() with module-level vi.mock() patterns
3. Use enhanced test utilities from apps/sim/app/api/__test-utils__/
4. Implement proper authentication and database mocking
5. Add comprehensive logging and production-ready comments

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- 90%+ test pass rate across all migrated files
- All authentication tests returning proper status codes (200/201 not 403/500)
- Production-ready test patterns with comprehensive logging
- Full compatibility with bun/vitest environment
